<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Tandemact is indicated for the treatment of patients with type-2 diabetes mellitus who show intolerance to metformin or for whom metformin is contraindicated and who are already treated with a...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（99.8%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（99.7%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（99.6%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（99.6%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（99.6%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（99.6%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（99.5%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（98.9%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（98.8%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus, insulin-dependent, X-linked, susceptibility to（92.4%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（92.3%）</li>
<li>permanent neonatal diabetes mellitus（82.4%）</li>
<li>type 2 diabetes mellitus（79.1%）</li>
<li>IDDM 1（77.9%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（71.4%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（65.0%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（63.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
